name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim in Utah after getting hurt at work?
description: 180 days max to report in Utah; do it ASAP.[1]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim in Utah after getting hurt at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: 180 days max to report in Utah; do it ASAP.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Report within 180 days or benefits may be barred; file Form 122 promptly after notice.[1] Utah requires 'as soon as practicable,' with strict 180-day cutoff.[1] Key factors: timestamp via email/report; occupational diseases need causation proof. File even if late with explanation.[1][2] Attorney can help meet deadlines.
